headline: CUZ Q1 FFO Beats Estimates on Strong Leasing, Revenues Top
summary: CUZ beats Q1 FFO estimates as leasing stays strong, revenues rise, and 2026 guidance widens with buybacks and debt financing gains.

headline: BXP Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: BXP (NYSE:BXP) executives highlighted what they described as a strong start to 2026, driven by leasing momentum, continued disposition activity, and progress on the company’s development pipeline.
